pages.raw_text:
County Superintendent of Schools
Marshall b. Watkins is back from his
trip to Olympia, where he was in
attendance upon the annual meeting
or the school superintendent of the
state. Mr.. Watkins said that he had
not been able to complete all his ar
rangements for the coming institute
for Spokane county. but he had fixed
upon the first week in November as
the time


Il met many people whom 1 would
like to have here at the institute, but
have secured only one-Professor A.
III. Yoder of the state university at
Seattle. l really expect to have with
us DIR. r. G. Boone. editor OF Educa-
tion. DR.. Boone was formerly super
intendent of the schools Of Cincinnati
and later president of the state nor
NAL school of Michigan. He Is an
able man and, as he speaks the previ-
Gus week at the Kittitas county in
stitute. have high hopes of securing
him for Spokane. AS TO the others,
II Is a matter of correspondence be-
fore any definite announcement can
be made.
